evals.name: react-chat-client
evals.prompt: I'm building a React app that needs to connect to a Rivet chat room actor. I want to display messages in real-time and allow users to send new messages. Can you show me how to set up the client?
evals.expected_output: React component using rivetkit/client with connection, event subscription, and action calls

evals.name: connection-params-auth
evals.prompt: My Rivet actor requires authentication. Users pass a JWT token when connecting. How do I set up the client to send auth parameters when connecting to the actor?
evals.expected_output: Client code showing params or getParams configuration for connection authentication

assertions.name: uses_params_or_getParams
assertions.description: Uses params or getParams for connection

evals.name: error-handling-client
evals.prompt: I need to handle errors properly in my Rivet client. The actor can throw UserError with specific error codes. How do I catch and handle these errors on the client side?
evals.expected_output: Error handling code using ActorError class with proper type checking

assertions.name: uses_instanceof_check
assertions.description: Uses instanceof ActorError for error checking
